station_code: Must match an existing station code in INMACOM database  (must be a borehole or piezometer station)
value: Primary water level value — must match selected unit
unit: m_bgl | m_asl | m  (m_bgl = metres below ground level; m_asl = metres above sea level)
depth_to_water_m: Depth to the water surface from ground level in metres (fill regardless of unit choice)
water_level_masl: Water level expressed as metres above sea level (fill if known, regardless of unit choice)
pumping_status: resting | pumping | recovering  (borehole condition at time of measurement)
conductivity_uScm: Electrical conductivity measured in field in µS/cm (optional field parameter)
ph_field: pH measured in field (optional field parameter)
temperature_c: Water temperature in °C measured in field (optional field parameter)
